disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Six months of recurrent redness and swelling of the glans and foreskin, acutely worse tonight
trigger_question_examples: What has been happening with your penis?
How long has this been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The head of my penis and the foreskin have gone red and swollen over and over for about six months, and tonight it has blown up worse than ever.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Thick white curdy discharge under the foreskin with intense itch, burning and a sweet foul smell
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a thick white curdy stuff building up underneath, it itches and burns badly, and there's a sweet horrible smell.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive inability to retract the foreskin
trigger_question_examples: Can you pull the foreskin back?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't pull the foreskin back at all now — it used to be fine but it's got tighter and tighter and it won't move.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Several months of intense thirst, drinking constantly, passing large amounts of urine, and profound fatigue
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any other symptoms?
Any change in your thirst, energy, or how often you pass urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For months now I've been so thirsty I can't stop drinking, I'm up all night passing loads of urine, and I'm exhausted all the time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain with sexual activity before the swelling closed over, and high distress from the sensitive nature of the problem
trigger_question_examples: Has it been painful during intimacy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It was really painful during sex before it swelled up completely — it's embarrassing to talk about.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'd rather not go into that side of things if that's okay.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No regular medications, no recent medical care, and a very high daily intake of sugary soft drinks
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any medications or do you see a doctor regularly?
What is your usual diet and drink like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm not on anything and I haven't seen a doctor in years. I drink a lot of soft drink every day.
